# eCommerce & CMS Platform Blueprint

<blockquote>
An ultra-high-performance, zero-hydration, resumable eCommerce and Content Management architecture deployed entirely at the edge via Qwik City and Cloudflare Pages.
</blockquote>

## Core Architectural Architecture
* [Foundations](/docs/architecture/foundations) - Understanding resumability, serialization graphs, and why hydration is skipped.
* [Edge Deployment](/docs/architecture/cloudflare-edge) - Edge clustering, worker lifecycles, and cache tuning parameters.

## Primary Sub-paths
* [Product Catalog](/products) - Entry node to the static product catalog data graph.
* [Documentation / CMS](/docs) - Full corpus of documentation and markdown-driven headless content.
* [Cryptographic Trust Protocols](/docs/security/trust-manifests) - Technical details regarding AT Protocol and Nostr identity verification mappings.

## Optional Resources
* [API Specification](/api/v1/endpoints) - Raw data endpoints returning semantic JSON matrices.
* [Repository Synchronization](/docs/headless-cms/git-sync) - Build-time Git automation pipelines.
